subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-04-07 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: Consider man's infidelity. With a thousand worries, troubles and tears he raises a child. Then, he readily puts thousands upon thousands to the sword.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چقدر انسان بیوفا است بهزار زحمت و مشقت و با اشک
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @justice and wrath of God, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @love and unity
